summary: The diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo, frontend/src/App.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json. The changes appear to address the hanging draft preview issue by fixing the profile loading logic in App.tsx (adding error fallback to avoid infinite spinner) and adjusting query hooks in useQueries.ts (retry: false on profile, proper enabled conditions). Previously implemented features (monthly snapshots, asset forms, charts, mock rate fetchers) are referenced as intact in the file summaries. The rebuild objective is largely addressed through these targeted fixes rather than a full clean rebuild, but the functional requirements are met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Perform a clean rebuild and redeploy of the entire application (frontend and backend) to resolve the draft preview hanging on load.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows targeted code fixes rather than evidence of a clean rebuild/redeploy. There are no build configuration changes, deployment manifests, CI/CD pipeline changes, or cache-busting artifacts present. While the code fixes may resolve the hanging spinner issue functionally, there is no evidence that a full clean rebuild and redeploy was performed as specified.
